item.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer [Full Time; 100% remote; US-only], Hive Collective
item.guid: senior full stack engineer full time 100 remote us only|hive collective
item.description: Job Title Senior Full-Stack Engineer [Full Time; 100% remote; US-only] Job Description The Role You'd be joining a lean, high-leverage engineering team tackling the complexity of legal software — not by pushing longer hours, but by getting genuinely good at working alongside AI. This isn't a "we occasionally use ChatGPT" team. The group is actively figuring out how to hand repetitive engineering work to AI so people can spend their time on the problems that actually need human judgment. If you l

item.title: Senior Python Engineer, EPAM
item.description: Job Title Senior Python Engineer Job Description We are seeking a Senior Python Engineer who brings strong backend development expertise along with a solid grasp of cloud-native solutions. The right candidate will be capable of designing, building and maintaining scalable backend services through Python and modern cloud platforms. Countries : Argentina, Australia, Bulgaria, Canada, Chile, China, Colombia, Czech Republic, Greece, Hong Kong, Japan, Malaysia, Mexico,Romania, Singapore, Slovakia, Uk

item.title: Senior Backend Engineer
item.description: MyOme is seeking a Senior Backend Engineer to join its integrations and portal team, enabling patients and providers to order genetic testing and understand results through portal enhancements and backend systems. Responsibilities include adding new features to backend systems for portal improvements, building reusable components to support integration partners, creating test data for system design/development, developing new APIs, contributing via code reviews and design discussions, and partic

item.title: Senior Python/DevOps Engineer (100% Remote - USA Only), Six Feet Up
item.guid: senior python devops engineer 100 remote usa only|six feet up
item.description: Job Title Senior Python/DevOps Engineer (100% Remote - USA Only) Job Description Six Feet Up is seeking a seasoned Python/DevOps Engineer (100% remote, USA only) who can work across software development, architecture, cloud infrastructure, data, AI, and client collaboration. This role is for an experienced engineering generalist: someone with deep expertise who is not limited to one framework, platform, or layer of the stack. You are comfortable entering unfamiliar systems, clarifying ambiguous

item.title: Python + TypeScript Engineers
item.description: Job Description Fusionbox is a software engineering consultancy that builds enterprise software the right way. We negotiate the right to open source all our client code, maintain a handful of popular libraries, and our engineers contribute to Django core. We sponsor PyCon, DjangoCon, and Django Girls because we're invested in the ecosystem we build on. We're looking for software engineers who value software design, system architecture, and collaboration. You should be strong in most of these are
item.location: Remote, Remote (US Based), Any US State, US

item.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
item.description: Join a lean, high-leverage engineering team building legal/compliance SaaS software. The role is to help evolve the org toward an AI-native software development process, using AI tooling as a real engineering collaborator to automate repetitive work while focusing human judgment on complex problems. Responsibilities include: Improve internal developer workflows using AI to ship faster, automate regression coverage, and maintain code quality. Design, build, ship, and support full-stack systems en

item.title: Freelance Full-Stack Web App Developer
item.guid: freelance full stack web app developer|mindrift
item.description: Mindrift is looking for skilled Full-Stack Web App Developers (JavaScript/TypeScript + Python or Node) to join the Tendem project ( Tendem.ai ) and build interactive browser-based applications in a hybrid AI + human environment. The role (“AI Pilot”) involves collaborating with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while the developer provides full-stack engineering expertise, architectural judgment, and quality control to ensure web apps are functional, robust, and ready for real users. R
